response.justification: Bogdan has impressive technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks explicit evidence of IT architecture leadership, UML expertise, team management at executive level, and German proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this role; his entrepreneurial spirit and technical versatility are strong positives but don't fully offset the gaps in required leadership and language qualifications.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse languages and environments (DLang, Node.js, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, courses, code katas)
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' — below required C1 level
No clear evidence of architectural ownership, UML modeling, or formal project management leadership
Lack of demonstrated experience in IT security, compliance, or client advisory roles in consulting context
